messages.content:
In the 1960s, ARPANET, later known as the Internet, was developed by a collaboration of: 

Multiple choice question.

the Department of the Army and private industry.


the U.S. Department of Defense and university researchers.


the Department of the Navy and private industry.
the U.S. Department of Defense and university researchers.

Why do people engage in flaming?

Multiple select question.

Digital media are more impersonal (less social presence) than most other communication channels, which reduces the sender’s empathy and sensitivity when crafting the message.


Senders tend to infer a less respectful interpretation of their digital message than was perceived by the receiver.


Digital messages take longer to prepare and deliver, allowing the sender to reflect more calmly on the content before it is sent. 


Digital messages can be written and transmitted before the sender’s emotions subside.

Digital media are more impersonal (less social presence) than most other communication channels, which reduces the sender’s empathy and sensitivity when crafting the message.

Senders tend to infer a less respectful interpretation of their digital message than was perceived by the receiver.

Digital messages can be written and transmitted before the sender’s emotions subside.

Fill in the blank question.
Employees in almost every age group use 
 more often than any other communication channel.
Employees in almost every age group use email more often than any other communication channel.

Facial expressions and gestures are examples of __ communication channels.

Multiple choice question.

codebook


nonverbal


emotional


verbal
nonverbal

Digital messages contribute to 
 overload.
Digital messages contribute to information overload.

Enterprise collaboration platforms such as Slack, Microsoft Teams, Workplace (from Facebook), Basecamp, and others:

Multiple choice question.

are rapidly being banned from use in the workplace.


will soon be obsolete.


have been available for more than 20 years.


are rapidly being introduced in the workplace.
are rapidly being introduced in the workplace.

Email and other forms of digital written communication potentially:

Multiple choice question.

increase stereotyping and prejudice because features of the participants are clearly identifiable.


increase social and organizational status differences between send and receiver.


reduce stereotyping and prejudice because features of the participants are unknown or less noticeable.


reduce the overall volume of communications.
reduce stereotyping and prejudice because features of the participants are unknown or less noticeable.

Digital communication channels that enable people to collaborate in the creation and exchange of user-generated content is referred to as 
 
.
Digital communication channels that enable people to collaborate in the creation and exchange of user-generated content is referred to as social media.
Digital messages that communicate hostility and other forms of disrespect is referred to as
Digital messages that communicate hostility and other forms of disrespect are referred to as cyberbullying.

True or False Question
Most information is communicated verbally.

True false question.
True
False
False. Most information is not communicated verbally.
